title: New recipes in Formula PRO Automations: Auto‑Remove “(copy)” on Duplicated Items!

posts.author: hellotimi (David Kalu (Formula Pro - Use formula column results in automations!))
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi everyone—great news for those of you who duplicate items frequently: Formula PRO now includes 4 ready‑made recipes that strip out the annoying “(copy)” suffix for you!

How it works:

  1. Install Formula PRO (we have a free tier so you can start without spending a dime).
  2. On your board, add the recipe “When item duplicated, remove (copy) suffix from item name.”
  3. Boom—every time you duplicate, the new item comes in perfectly named.

Bonus: We’re packaging these recipes into a new free app in the Marketplace—coming very soon.
Subitem and Mirror Column support coming soon.

Add Formula PRO to your board in one click

Screenshot 2025-06-11 at 13.22.091388×1274 76.6 KB

Give it a spin today and tell us:
What other little annoyances should we automate next?
